rubricContent.textProperty: If no violations were found, the response clearly states the item is clean. If violations were found, the response accurately names the violation type (e.g., MISSING_FIELD) and the affected field (e.g., allergen_statement).
The response clearly states the final outcome: whether the item was clean, approved, rejected, auto-applied, or escalated for manual review.
The response includes a structured summary with the item name or SKU ID, any violations found, and the resolution status.
